import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has_digit = false
  while i < n
    let bo = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bo
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if has_digit
          result = list.push(result, current * sign)
          current = 0
          sign = 1
          has_digit = false
        end
      else if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else if b == 43
        sign = 1
      else
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digit = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    result = list.push(result, current * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1_opt = io.read_line()
  let line2_opt = io.read_line()
  let line1 = match line1_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match line2_opt
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let threshold_list = parse_ints(line2)
  let t = match threshold_list.get(0)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end

  mut output = ""
  mut first = true
  let len = nums.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < len
    match nums.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > t
        if first
          output = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          output = "#{output} #{v}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(output)
end
